posts.author: Sanath (Devadiga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all , how can i call netsuite restlet as endpoint url for webhook with oath 2 .is it possible to call netsuite restlet as webhook ?

Also instead of iam using pipedream url webhook url from their iam calling netsuite open url but for trial account its working (pipedreams webhook url ).but when i do same thing with production account its not working its not teuggering pipedreams url only .

I used Playground for calling webhook

Please help me on this .
Thank you in advance .
